---
name: New skill proposal
about: Propose a new skill for this library
title: "[skill] <skill-name>"
labels: "new-skill"
---

## Skill name

`<skill-name>` (must be lowercase, hyphens only, matches directory name)

## What it does

One paragraph. What problem does it solve? What does the agent do when the skill is activated?

## When it triggers

Be specific. What user request or condition activates this skill?

## When it does NOT trigger

Explicit exclusions — what looks similar but should NOT trigger this skill?

## Target platforms

- [ ] Claude Code
- [ ] OpenAI Codex
- [ ] Gemini CLI
- [ ] Other: ___

## Scripts needed?

- [ ] Yes — describe what they do:
- [ ] No — the LLM handles everything

## Domain

- [ ] Engineering (code, git, CI/CD)
- [ ] Finance / Accounting
- [ ] Legal / Compliance
- [ ] Healthcare
- [ ] DeFi / Blockchain
- [ ] Other: ___
